# BP-76 positive: map iteration is joined without sorting the collected keys.
lang: go
file: BP-76-vulnerable.go
variant: stdlib
---
package sample

import "strings"

func names() string {
	items := map[string]int{"b": 2, "a": 1}
	keys := make([]string, 0, len(items))
	for key := range items {
		keys = append(keys, key)
	}
	return strings.Join(keys, ",")
}
